base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_5_1_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1985 super mario bros. Overworld, similar to 3-1 night palette. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Overworld, similar to 3-1 night palette; mixes Hammer-Bros + Lakitu + Spinies.
